title: Entry Visa for Residents of GCC Countries and Their Companions
eligibility: Must be a resident of a GCC country with a valid GCC residence permit. Profession must be among the approved professions, and the applicant must not have any entry restrictions to the UAE.
documents: Passport or travel document (valid for at least 6 months), Copy of GCC residence permit, Recent passport-size photo with white background.
steps: 1. Log in to https://smart.gdrfad.gov.ae and register as a user. 2. Choose the required service. 3. Fill in the application details. 4. Pay the required fees. 5. After approval, the visa is sent to the user's email.
fees: Application Fee: AED 250 | VAT: 5% | Extension: Can be extended once for an additional 30 days.

title: Job Seeker Visit Visa
eligibility: Hold a Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification. Be a skilled professional in Skill Level 1, 2, or 3 according to MOHRE, OR be a graduate from a top 500 university within the last 2 years. Meet financial guarantee requirements.
documents: Recent coloured passport-size photo, Passport copy (valid for at least 6 months), Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification certificate.
steps: 1. Apply online via smart services system using UAE Pass, or visit an Amer Center / Customer Happiness Centre. 2. Fill out application data and upload documents. 3. Pay fees and submit.
fees: 60 Days: AED 200 | 90 Days: AED 300 | 120 Days: AED 400 | Security Deposit: AED 1000 | VAT: 5%

title: Visit Visa for Exploring Business Opportunities
eligibility: Applicant must be an entrepreneur, investor, or business professional. Must meet financial requirements set by UAE authorities, and passport must be valid for at least 6 months.
documents: Recent coloured passport-size photo, Passport copy (valid for at least 6 months), Proof of financial solvency, Documents supporting business or investment activity (if applicable).
steps: 1. Apply online via GDRFA website/app or visit an Amer center / Customer Happiness Center. 2. Fill out application details and upload financial verification. 3. Pay fees and submit.
fees: 60 Days: AED 200 | 90 Days: AED 300 | 120 Days: AED 400 | Security Deposit: AED 1000 | VAT: 5%

title: Medical Visa
eligibility: Must require medical treatment in the UAE and be sponsored by a licensed healthcare facility in the UAE. Must have valid health insurance and required medical documents.
documents: Passport copy (valid for at least 6 months), Recent passport-size photo, Medical report, Letter from the healthcare facility stating the reason for the visit, Valid health insurance, Travel ticket.
steps: 1. Apply through GDRFA digital portal. 2. Log in using UAE Pass or credentials. 3. Fill out medical details and upload hospital letter + report. 4. Pay fees and submit.
fees: 90-Day Single: AED 200 | 180-Day Single: AED 500 | 90-Day Multiple: AED 300 | 180-Day Multiple: AED 900 | Security Deposit (Single): AED 1000 | Security Deposit (Multiple): AED 2000 | Inside country fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20

title: Residence Visa - Private Sector
eligibility: Must have a job offer or employment with a UAE private sector company. Employer must sponsor the residence visa. Must pass the required medical fitness test (age 18+).
documents: Passport copy, Recent passport-size photo with white background, Medical fitness certificate.
steps: 1. Employer registers the request on GDRFA. 2. Undergo medical fitness test and apply for Emirates ID. 3. Pay fees and complete processing. 4. Grace period after expiry or cancellation is 60 days.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 200 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Note: Issuance fee increases by AED 100 annually for periods over 2 years.

title: Residence Visa - Public Sector
eligibility: Must be employed in the UAE public sector. Must pass the required medical examination. Passport must be valid for more than 6 months.
documents: Passport copy, Recent personal photo with white background, Medical examination report approved by relevant authorities (valid for 3 months).
steps: 1. Log in to GDRFA/ICP smart services. 2. Fill in application details and upload medical report. 3. Pay fees. 4. Grace period after expiry or cancellation is 60 days.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 200 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Note: Issuance fee increases by AED 100 annually for periods over 2 years.

title: New Work Permit
eligibility: Employee must be 18 years or older. Establishment must have an available electronic quota and a valid trade license with no violations. Applicant must not already hold an active work permit.
documents: Signed job offer from the employer, Passport copy of the employee, Professional license (if applicable), Additional documents as requested by MOHRE.
steps: 1. Log in to MOHRE portal using credentials or UAE Pass. 2. Submit the work permit application. 3. MOHRE reviews. 4. Upon approval, pay federal fees and bank guarantees.
fees: Federal Application Fee: AED 50 | Category 1 Permit Fee: AED 250 | Category 2 Permit Fee: AED 1200 | Category 3 Permit Fee: AED 3450 | Business Center Service Fee Cap: AED 72

title: Student Residence Visa
eligibility: International students enrolled in an accredited educational institution in the UAE. Must be sponsored by the university or an eligible parent. Passport must be valid for at least 6 months.
documents: Passport copy (valid for at least 6 months), Recent passport-size photo with white background, University admission letter or study certificate, Medical fitness certificate (if required), Health insurance, Emirates ID application.
steps: 1. Log in to GDRFA/ICP system. 2. Search for Student Residence Visa service. 3. Fill in application data and upload university admission letter. 4. Pay fees. 5. Student is allowed to remain in the UAE for up to 180 days after completing studies.
fees: University processing fees vary | Standard Gov fees apply (approx. AED 500 - 1,200 depending on location).

title: Golden Residence Permit - Top Students and Graduates
eligibility: Top High School Students (minimum 95% score, certificate attested by Ministry of Education); Top UAE University Graduates (GPA Classification A min 3.5, Classification B min 3.8, graduated within 2 years); Top International University Graduates (top 100 global university ranking, GPA min 3.5, graduated within 2 years).
documents: Passport copy, Attested academic certificates, Current UAE residency file copy (Dubai-issued), UAEICP nomination approval.
steps: 1. Apply for eligibility nomination via ICP or GDRFA. 2. Submit verified academic records. 3. Upon approval, apply for 10-year residency via GDRFA/Amer.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Total Service Cost: AED 2790

title: Golden Residence Permit - Pioneers of Humanitarian Work
eligibility: Must obtain recommendation from Ministry of Community Empowerment. Minimum 5 years as member/employee of an international/regional humanitarian organization or public benefit association, OR receive humanitarian awards, OR provide financial support of min AED 2M, OR hold a university degree.
documents: Passport copy, Recommendation letter from the Ministry of Community Empowerment, Current residence permit copy (Dubai-issued).
steps: 1. Obtain nomination from the Ministry. 2. Receive approval via UAEICP system. 3. Apply via GDRFA portal or Amer center. 4. Pay fees.
fees: Residence Permit: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Golden holders are exempt from the 180-day stay abroad rule.

title: Golden Residence Permit - Specialized Scientists and Professionals
eligibility: Scientists, researchers, specialists, healthcare professionals, educators, industrial experts, and highly skilled workers. Skilled workers require a Bachelor's degree or higher, active employment contract, and a minimum monthly basic salary of AED 30,000 (excluding allowances).
documents: Passport copy, UAEICP approval, Nomination letter from relevant UAE authority, Bachelor's degree or higher qualification, Employment contract, 6-month bank statements showing salary transfers.
steps: 1. Obtain nomination from relevant authority. 2. Receive UAEICP approval. 3. Apply via GDRFA or Amer center. 4. Submit contracts and bank statement.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Total Service Cost: AED 2790 | Golden holders are exempt from the 180-day stay abroad rule.

title: Golden Residence Permit - Entrepreneurs
eligibility: Must be nominated by Dubai Future Foundation. Project must be registered with Ministry of Economy or DED and generate at least AED 1 million annual revenue, OR have established business with at least AED 2 million revenue, OR have sold a startup/business for at least AED 7 million.
documents: Passport copy, Nomination letter from Dubai Future Foundation, Startup valuation financial tracking.
steps: 1. Secure nomination from Dubai Future Foundation. 2. Submit request online via GDRFA or at Amer Center. 3. Pay fees and wait for approval.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Total Service Cost: AED 2280 | Golden holders are exempt from the 180-day stay abroad rule.

title: Golden Residence Permit - Investors
eligibility: Own a company investment worth at least AED 2 million, OR own real estate worth at least AED 2 million (must maintain ownership during the visa period), OR hold bank deposit of at least AED 2 million in a UAE bank, OR pay taxes of at least AED 250,000 annually.
documents: Passport copy, Proof of investment (property deed, company trade license showing share valuation, bank certificate), Supporting financial audited accounts.
steps: 1. Log in to GDRFA/ICP. 2. Select Investors Golden Residency. 3. Upload property deeds or company registration details. 4. Pay fees and wait for approval.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Total Service Cost: AED 2790 | Golden holders are exempt from the 180-day stay abroad rule.

title: Golden Residence Permit - Talented Individuals
eligibility: Exceptional talent in culture and arts, innovators/inventors, elite athletes, or digital technology talent. Requires nomination or recommendation from a relevant UAE ministry or authority.
documents: Passport copy, Nomination letter from the relevant UAE authority, Supporting portfolio showing achievements, awards, or patent certifications.
steps: 1. Secure official nomination. 2. Fill in application on GDRFA. 3. Submit credentials and achievements portfolio. 4. Wait for approval.
fees: Residence Permit Fee: AED 1100 | Inside Country Fee: AED 500 | Knowledge & Innovation Dirham: AED 20 | Delivery Fee: AED 20 | Total Service Cost: AED 2790 | Golden holders are exempt from the 180-day stay abroad rule.

title: New Driving Licence
eligibility: UAE citizens and residents. Must meet minimum age requirement for vehicle category (Motorcycle: 17, Light Vehicle: 18, Heavy Vehicle: 20, Light/Heavy Bus: 21). Must pass eye test and be medically fit.
documents: Valid Emirates ID, Valid eye test report, Existing foreign license (if applicable for evaluation classes).
steps: 1. Select a driving institute and open a file. 2. Pass eye test. 3. Complete theoretical lectures and pass the theory test. 4. Complete practical training hours. 5. Pass internal, yard, and road tests. 6. Pay fees and collect license.
fees: Traffic File: AED 200 | Learning Permit (Light): AED 100 | Learning Permit (Heavy): AED 200 | Eye Test: AED 140 - AED 180 | License Issuance (<21 yrs): AED 100 | License Issuance (21+ yrs): AED 300 | Knowledge & Innovation Fee: AED 20
processing_time: Instant after passing tests and paying fees

title: Driving Licence Renewal
eligibility: Must hold valid or expired UAE driving license. Must pay all outstanding traffic fines. Eye test is mandatory. Medical fitness test required for professional drivers.
documents: Valid Emirates ID, Valid eye test report, Medical fitness report (for professional drivers).
steps: 1. Complete eye test at approved center (valid for 3 years). 2. Log in using Emirates ID/Passport on RTA. 3. Pay fines and renewal fees. 4. Choose license delivery method. (Licences expired for more than 10 years require an Evaluation Test).
fees: License Issuance (<21 yrs): AED 100 | License Issuance (21+ yrs): AED 300 | Eye Test: AED 140 - 180 | Late Renewal Fine: AED 10 per month (max AED 500) | Knowledge & Innovation Fee: AED 20

title: Exchange of Foreign Driving Licence
eligibility: At least 18 years old. Citizens of approved exempt countries holding a valid foreign license and valid UAE residency status. Must pass eye test.
documents: Valid original foreign driving license, Legal translation of license, Eye test report, Valid Emirates ID / residence visa, Passport copy.
steps: 1. Undergo eye test. 2. Submit exchange application via MOI website/app or visit local licensing center. 3. Pay fees and receive instant converted UAE license.
fees: Federal Service Fee: AED 600 | Knowledge & Innovation Fee: AED 20

title: Request to Issue Trade Licence
eligibility: Entrepreneurs establishing standard, fast-track, or home-based businesses. Activity must be approved under local DED regulations. Normal license requires a physical lease (Ejari), Instant/eTrader do not.
documents: Emirates ID copy, Reserved trade name certificate, Initial approval certificate, MOA (for Normal LLC), Ejari lease agreement (for Normal LLC).
steps: 1. Select license type (Normal, Instant, or eTrader). 2. Submit trade name registration at DED/Invest in Dubai. 3. Select activity and pay fees. 4. Retrieve digital trade license.
fees: eTrader License: AED 1070 + AED 300 (Dubai Chamber membership) | Normal LLC License fees vary based on company legal form and commercial activities.
processing_time: Instant License: 5 minutes | eTrader License: 5 minutes | Normal License: up to 10 minutes (varies by external approvals)

title: Visit Visa for Visiting Relatives and Friends
eligibility: Sponsors must meet monthly salary requirements depending on relationship category: First-degree (father/mother/spouse/children) requires AED 4,000; Second/Third-degree (siblings/grandparents/uncles/cousins) requires AED 8,000; Friends (non-relatives) requires AED 15,000.
documents: Passport copy (valid min 6 months), Personal photo, Proof of kinship/relationship certificate (for relatives), Return flight ticket, Sponsor's residence permit & salary certificate.
steps: 1. Log in to UAE smart services or GDRFA portal. 2. Complete sponsor and applicant data. 3. Upload proof of relationship and salary cert. 4. Pay application fees and financial guarantee deposit.
fees: Application Fee: AED 100 | Smart Service Fee: AED 100 | Single entry visa (per month): AED 100 | Multiple entry visa (per month): AED 200 | Single-entry guarantee deposit: AED 1000 | Multiple-entry guarantee deposit: AED 2000 | Overstay fine: AED 50/day
